summary: Complete testing of Firmes Financial (Financeiro) Module. Backend 32/32 tests passed. Frontend all 12 financial pages working: Resumo, Transacoes, Relatorios, Historico, Categorias, Contas, Contatos, Centros de Custos, Bloqueio, Importar, Exportar, Painel Estrategico. All CRUD operations, business rules, and UI dialogs validated.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test accounts, categories, transactions for testing. Some TEST_ prefixed data may remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial (Financeiro) module fully tested. All 12 pages functional via sidebar submenu under 'Financeiro'. Backend endpoints tested: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE for contas, categorias, centros-custo, contatos, transacoes, periodos-bloqueados, GET resumo, GET painel-estrategico, POST importar. Frontend routes: /dashboard/financial (resumo), /dashboard/financial/transactions, /dashboard/financial/reports, /dashboard/financial/history, /dashboard/financial/categories, /dashboard/financial/accounts, /dashboard/financial/contacts, /dashboard/financial/cost-centers, /dashboard/financial/lock-periods, /dashboard/financial/import, /dashboard/financial/export, /dashboard/financial/strategic.

sidebar_navigation.details: Financeiro expandable menu with 12 sub-items: Resumo, Transacoes, Relatorios, Historico, Categorias, Contas, Contatos, Centros de Custos, Bloqueio, Importar, Exportar, Painel Estrategico

fin_resumo_page.details: Shows KPI cards: Saldo Total, Receitas (Mes), Despesas (Mes), Resultado (Mes), Resultado Geral. Saldo por Conta list, Por Categoria breakdown, Fluxo de Caixa (6 meses) chart

fin_transacoes_page.details: Transaction list with Nova Transacao button, search, filters (Tipo, Status). Table shows Tipo icon, Data, Descricao, Categoria, Conta, Valor, Status badge. Dropdown menu per row

fin_relatorios_page.details: Shows Fluxo de Caixa Mensal report with Mes, Receitas, Despesas, Resultado columns. Report type dropdown, CSV export button

fin_historico_page.details: Audit log list showing all financial actions

fin_categorias_page.details: Category cards with Nova Categoria button, tipo filter (receita/despesa), color indicator

fin_contas_page.details: Account cards with Nova Conta button, tipo badge, saldo_atual, saldo_inicial. Dropdown with Editar, Excluir. Create dialog with nome, tipo select, saldo_inicial input

fin_contatos_page.details: Contact management with Novo Contato button, tipo filter

fin_centros_custo_page.details: Cost center management with Novo Centro button

fin_bloqueio_page.details: Period lock management with Bloquear Periodo button, list of blocked periods

fin_exportar_page.details: Export options with tipo select (Transacoes), date range pickers, Exportar CSV button

fin_painel_estrategico_page.details: Strategic dashboard with KPIs: Receita Anual, Despesa Anual, Resultado Anual, Saude Financeira. Comparativo Mensal (12 meses) chart

ui_create_account.details: Tested creating account via UI dialog - form opens, accepts input, submits successfully with toast confirmation

backend_transacoes_crud.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/fin/transacoes with tipo, status, search filters. Enriches with conta_nome, categoria_nome

backend_transacao_business_rules.details: Confirmed: negative values rejected (400), confirmed tx can only be cancelled (not edited), confirmed tx cannot be deleted, balance auto-updates on create/cancel

backend_periodos_bloqueados.details: POST/GET/DELETE /api/church/fin/periodos-bloqueados. Transactions in blocked period rejected

backend_account_with_transactions.details: Accounts with linked transactions cannot be deleted (returns 400)

backend_audit_logs.details: GET /api/church/fin/logs returns all financial action logs with acao, usuario, data_hora

backend_resumo.details: GET /api/church/fin/resumo returns saldo_total, contas, receitas_mes, despesas_mes, resultado_mes, por_categoria, fluxo_mensal

backend_painel_estrategico.details: GET /api/church/fin/painel-estrategico returns receita_anual, despesa_anual, resultado_anual, comparativo_mensal, top_despesas, saude_financeira

backend_importar.details: POST /api/church/fin/importar accepts {rows: [...]} and returns {imported, errors}. Handles invalid values gracefully

coverage: Categorias: Create receita, Create despesa, List with filter, Update, Delete
Transacoes: Create receita, Create despesa, Create transferencia, List with filters
Transacoes Business Rules: Negative value rejected, Confirmed cannot be edited, Confirmed can be cancelled with balance reversal, Confirmed cannot be deleted
Periodos Bloqueados: Block period, List, Transaction in blocked period rejected, Unblock
Account with transactions cannot be deleted
Importar: Import transactions, Handle invalid values
